Title: Davy, M.-M.
Overview: Medievalist, specialist in Romanesque.Davy's essay Essai sur la symbolique romane dealt with the creative power of the eleventh century (Sypher).
Selected Bibliography: Essai sur la symbolique romane (XIIe siècle). Paris: Flammarion, 1955.
Sources: Sypher, Wylie, ed. Art History; an Anthology of Modern Criticism. Gloucester, MA: P. Smith, 1975, p. 117, mentioned; Davy, Marie-Madeleine. Traversée en solitaire. Paris: A. Michel, 1989
